title: rosa × dumetorum f. obtusifolia
intro: Rosa × dumetorum f. obtusifolia is a hybrid rose species known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to aid in wound healing and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum f. obtusifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and promote overall well-being. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal use, with some herbalists also recommending its use in salves and creams for topical application.
